target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Catastrophic structural damage visible; turret and hull extensively destroyed with no major components intact; consistent with K-kill definition.

summary: One military equipment target has been assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single, heavily damaged tank with catastrophic structural failure, including a shattered turret and hull, lying amidst debris on uneven ground. The functional impact is complete loss of combat capability for the assessed target.
